spec.name: The South Entrance To The Coliseum
spec.description: You are standing at the south entrance to the Coliseum. There are citizens of Rome everywhere, apparently in a mad rush to get in. A statue of Caligula the Mad Emperor overlooks the area. There are long lines standing to the east, and an acrid smell is coming from the west. A busy road lies to the south.

east.description: The lines are very long and people look impatient.

south.description: A road lies in that direction.

west.description: An acrid, almost medicinal smell is coming from that direction.

extra_descs.description: A larger than life stone statue of Caligula, the Mad Emperor, looks at you. It looks like it is holding a phallus. He has got a grin on his face that seems to say 'My horse would like you, I bet...'
